top_signals.title: ‘Poorly designed’ policy threatening London’s grip on global tourism
top_signals.summary: London’s competitiveness as a leading culture and tourism destination is being undermined by “poorly designed” policy, the West End’s leading business advocate has warned. Dee Corsi, chief executive of the New West End Company (NWEC), has said that London is “competing with one hand tied behind its back” compared to global rivals whose policymakers are [...]

top_signals.title: People named Mark called upon to raise money at London charity golf day
top_signals.summary: Some of the UK’s estimated 600,000 people called Mark have been called upon to take part in a world record attempt at Royal Blackheath Golf Club to raise money for Prostate Cancer UK. The On Your Marks golf day will take 88 people called Mark and aim to raise £88,000 for charity just a stone’s [...]
